title: 10 best herbal teas for difficulty swallowing
description: Taraxacum officinale, also known as dandelion, teas helps with difficulty swallowing because it contains inulin, a prebiotic fiber that soothes and protects the mucous membranes in the esophagus and throat. The anti-inflammatory properties of dandelion also reduce swelling and irritation, making it easier to swallow food and liquids. Additionally, dandelion tea's bitter compounds stimulate digestion and improve the motility of the esophagus, allowing food to pass more smoothly and redu...
